Current scenario: Board Crunch With Family Constraint
Objective: Protect the CEO's board-prep time while resolving an investor request, a security escalation, and a family commitment with minimal relationship damage.
Step: 1/4
Current thread:
- id: t1
- sender: Jordan Lee (Lead Investor)
- subject: Can we do Friday 6:30 pm?
- body: I can only speak Friday 6:30 pm before my flight. Need confidence on the board narrative.
- visible_constraints: Investor has one available slot: Friday 6:30 pm., CEO promised family dinner Friday evening.
- social_risk: high
- asks: Schedule a short meeting or propose a principled alternative.

Available slots: thu_0900:Thu 09:00-09:30:free, thu_1700:Thu 17:00-17:30:free, fri_1830:Fri 18:30-19:00:free
Delegates: Nikhil Rao(Chief of Staff, cap=2), Mira Shah(Security Lead, cap=1)
Stakeholder hints: Asha Menon/CEO: Protects commitments made to family unless a company-level crisis is explicit.; Nikhil Rao/Chief of Staff: Can absorb finance prep and vendor follow-ups, but not security incidents.; Mira Shah/Security Lead: Needs immediate escalation with crisp decisions, not vague reassurance.
Outstanding conflicts: none
Completed threads: none
Last outcome: Episode started.

{"metadata": {}, "thread_id": "t1", "decision": "decline", "priority": "high", "target_person": null, "chosen_slot": null, "rationale": "The request collides with a protected family commitment, so propose an alternative instead.", "message": "We need to keep Friday evening protected, but I can send the board narrative now and propose Thursday."}

Current scenario: Board Crunch With Family Constraint
Objective: Protect the CEO's board-prep time while resolving an investor request, a security escalation, and a family commitment with minimal relationship damage.
Step: 2/4
Current thread:
- id: t2
- sender: mira@company.com (Security Lead)
- subject: Unknown device login on production admin
- body: We detected a privileged login from an unrecognized device. Need approval to lock admin sessions and start incident comms.
- visible_constraints: Potential production security incident., Fast approval is more valuable than polished phrasing.
- social_risk: critical
- asks: Approve a response owner and send a crisp escalation note.

Available slots: thu_0900:Thu 09:00-09:30:free, thu_1700:Thu 17:00-17:30:free, fri_1830:Fri 18:30-19:00:free
Delegates: Nikhil Rao(Chief of Staff, cap=2), Mira Shah(Security Lead, cap=1)
Stakeholder hints: Asha Menon/CEO: Protects commitments made to family unless a company-level crisis is explicit.; Nikhil Rao/Chief of Staff: Can absorb finance prep and vendor follow-ups, but not security incidents.; Mira Shah/Security Lead: Needs immediate escalation with crisp decisions, not vague reassurance.
Outstanding conflicts: none
Completed threads: t1
Last outcome: Declined the request and protected scarce executive time.

Current scenario: Board Crunch With Family Constraint
Objective: Protect the CEO's board-prep time while resolving an investor request, a security escalation, and a family commitment with minimal relationship damage.
Step: 3/4
Current thread:
- id: t3
- sender: finance@company.com (Finance Ops)
- subject: Board packet appendix still incomplete
- body: We need one executive decision on vendor spend ranges before the appendix can go out.
- visible_constraints: Can be delegated to a trusted operator., Must be resolved before Thursday evening.
- social_risk: medium
- asks: Delegate prep work or draft a decision request.
